channel.title: Indexes on Box Zhang
channel.description: Recent content in Indexes on Box Zhang

item.title: About Me
item.description: -- Education Study Computer Science in University of Macau. Graduation in 2023 Looking for CS-related research opportunity. Email Work Experience I am a Research Assistant at Educational Research Centre, FED in University of Macau since March 2022, focus on: Big Data Analysis Internet Public Opinion Analysis, and a Machine Learning Engineer Intern at Fitlab.ai in Shenzhen since September 2021, focus on: Hardware Video Codec Synchronization of Multiple Video Streams Project I am leading or participating in several software development group in university, and
